articles.title: Meta's Paid 'Momfluencer' Army: Big Tech Buys Medical Credibility to Whitewash Child Safety Crimes
articles.summary: Meta is paying Instagram influencers including doctors and psychologists with millions of followers to promote its Teen Account safety features. This astroturfing campaign aims to rehabilitate the company's disastrous child safety record through purchased medical endorsements.

articles.title: APA Silences Hopkins Psychiatrist Mid-Award Speech for Exposing Gaza Mental Health Crisis
articles.summary: The American Psychological Association gave Dr. Mansoor Malik a human rights award, then cut his microphone when he discussed Gaza's mental health impacts. The incident exposes how medical organizations suppress inconvenient truths even from their own award recipients.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Exposes Media's Role in Hyping 'Absurd' Research That Passes Peer Review
articles.summary: Aaron Brown's new book reveals how legitimate-looking research that is 'absurd on its face' gets published and hyped by media. The analysis exposes systemic failures in both peer review and science journalism that spread quantitative disinformation.
